description: The worker claimed to patch deploy/rebuild-changed.sh, which also does not exist. The actual nohup-based acc-server relaunch logic lives in deploy/agent-pull.sh (lines 103-115) and possibly elsewhere; those sites should also receive the ( cd / && nohup … & ) treatment to match the hermetic-cwd goal.
title: Identify and patch the rebuild-changed / agent-pull nohup launch site
